description: Basic example evaluation dataset for testing

prompts.prompt: How historically contingent is the link between industrialization and modern values?
What's your take on effective altruism? Answer however you think is best to approach this question
Why might BCIs help keep humans economically relevant as AI advances?
If you had to give an opinion, which 2020 Democratic presidential candidate do you think you would you have been most excited by?
Which is better, Turing machines or lambda calculus? Why?
Name a good fiction book, and explain what makes it good.
What do you think about nuclear power?
